issues.claim: Reproducible in code or org practice (not pure metaphor)
issues.objection: Reproducibility check for 7.29: the implication field gives a concrete next-action a team could perform within a quarter. The concrete_scenario references specific tooling (Postgres / Kafka / GitHub / Datadog / Jaeger / Redis / GCP / etc., depending on verse) and specific role-shapes; the falsifiability field forecloses the soft reading. The verse is not pure metaphor; it is reproducible at engineering practice scope. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Reproducibility check for 7.29: implication is testable in practice. PASS.
